author: Pixelastic
subject: refactor(pagination): First try on the BEM naming of a widget
body:
I added BEM naming to the pagination widget. The generated markup looks like: ```html
  • First
  • Previous
  • 1
  • 2
  • 3
  • 4
  • 5
  • Last
  • Last
``` Everytime I add a `BEM` class, one can add its own set of custom classes through the `cssClasses` object config in the widget. A default `pagination.css` file is provided but currently only includes the `visibility:hidden` styling of disabled elements. The demo styling is thus done through bootstrap classes. I quite happy with the end result. I also simplified the existing code in the process and moved all default attributes in the widget (instead of the components). I'm submitting the PR to get feedback and then I'll update the docs and maybe add some default styling not from Bootstrap.
